---
title: ""
page-layout: full
engine: markdown
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header"><h1>Reading List</h1></div>
<p style="margin:0 0 1.5rem 0;font-size:1rem;line-height:1.75;color:var(--text-muted);">Papers I've read recently — collaborator work, methodological references, and things worth knowing about.</p>
<hr style="border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);margin:0 0 1.5rem 0;">
<div id="reading-filter-bar" style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.4rem;margin-bottom:1.1rem;"></div>
<div id="reading-list"><p class="pub-loading">Loading…</p></div>
<script>
(async function() {
  const container = document.getElementById('reading-list');
  const filterBar = document.getElementById('reading-filter-bar');
  let entries = [];
  try {
    const res = await fetch('/data/reading.json');
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error();
    entries = await res.json();
  } catch {
    container.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;">Could not load reading list.</p>';
    return;
  }
  if (!entries.length) { container.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;">Nothing here yet.</p>'; return; }

  const GROUPS = {
    'School attendance': {
      color: '#2d6a4f',
      tags: new Set(['EBSA','Chronic absenteeism','Re-engagement','Transition',
        'Definitions','Conceptual','Review','Foundational','Systems model',
        'Systems framework','Systems theory','Education system','Education outcomes',
        'Student voice','School staff','Developmental','Clinical review',
        'Practitioner review','Framework','Differentiation','Editorial','Clinical synthesis'])
    },
    'Interventions': {
      color: '#c05a4a',
      tags: new Set(['Intervention','CBT','DBT','Mindfulness','VR','Pharmacology',
        'Multifamily therapy','Family coaching','RCT','Feasibility','Treatment outcomes',
        'Rehabilitation','Intervention development','Intervention outcomes',
        'CBT play therapy','CBT programme','School-based CBT','Parent program'])
    },
    'Population & context': {
      color: '#7b4f9e',
      tags: new Set(['Autism','Neurodiversity','Parent','Anxiety','Mental health',
        'Psychopathology','Comorbidity','ACEs','Gender','Bullying',
        'Individual differences','Parent experience','Inclusion','Parent factors',
        'Personality','Behavioural addiction'])
    },
    'Methods': {
      color: '#2c6e8a',
      tags: new Set(['Systematic review','Scoping review','Meta-analysis','Qualitative',
        'Methods','Risk of bias','Measurement','Network analysis','Measurement tool'])
    },
    'Digital & AI': {
      color: '#b07d2e',
      tags: new Set(['Digital','AI','Machine learning','Creativity','Digital feasibility'])
    }
  };

  const usedTags = new Set(entries.flatMap(e => e.tags || []));

  function tagColor(tag) {
    for (const g of Object.values(GROUPS)) {
      if (g.tags.has(tag)) return g.color;
    }
    return getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--navy').trim() || '#1e3a2a';
  }

  // activeFilters holds group names (whole group) or individual tag names
  let activeFilters = new Set();
  let openDropdown = null;

  function groupState(name) {
    if (activeFilters.has(name)) return 'full';
    if ([...GROUPS[name].tags].some(t => activeFilters.has(t))) return 'partial';
    return 'off';
  }

  function entryMatches(entry) {
    if (activeFilters.size === 0) return true;
    const tags = entry.tags || [];
    for (const f of activeFilters) {
      if (GROUPS[f]) { if (tags.some(t => GROUPS[f].tags.has(t))) return true; }
      else            { if (tags.includes(f)) return true; }
    }
    return false;
  }

  function renderFilterBar() {
    filterBar.innerHTML = '';
    Object.entries(GROUPS).forEach(([name, g]) => {
      const state   = groupState(name);
      const subActive = [...g.tags].filter(t => activeFilters.has(t));
      const isOpen  = openDropdown === name;

      const wrap = document.createElement('div');
      wrap.style.cssText = 'position:relative;display:inline-block;';

      // pill
      const pill = document.createElement('div');
      pill.style.cssText = `display:inline-flex;align-items:stretch;border:1.5px solid ${g.color};border-radius:999px;overflow:visible;`;

      // label (toggle whole group)
      const labelBtn = document.createElement('button');
      const labelOn  = state === 'full';
      labelBtn.textContent = subActive.length ? `${name} (${subActive.length})` : name;
      labelBtn.style.cssText = `background:${labelOn ? g.color : 'transparent'};color:${labelOn ? '#fff' : g.color};padding:0.25rem 0.7rem 0.25rem 0.85rem;border:none;border-radius:999px 0 0 999px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:${state !== 'off' ? 600 : 500};font-family:inherit;opacity:${state === 'off' ? 0.7 : 1};transition:all 0.15s;`;
      labelBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        [...g.tags].forEach(t => activeFilters.delete(t));
        if (activeFilters.has(name)) activeFilters.delete(name); else activeFilters.add(name);
        openDropdown = null;
        renderFilterBar(); renderList();
      });

      // chevron (open dropdown)
      const chevBtn = document.createElement('button');
      const chevOn  = state !== 'off' || isOpen;
      chevBtn.innerHTML = '&#9660;';
      chevBtn.style.cssText = `background:${chevOn ? `color-mix(in srgb,${g.color} 20%,transparent)` : 'transparent'};color:${g.color};padding:0.25rem 0.55rem;border:none;border-left:1.5px solid ${g.color}50;border-radius:0 999px 999px 0;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.58rem;font-family:inherit;transition:all 0.15s;`;
      chevBtn.addEventListener('click', e => {
        e.stopPropagation();
        openDropdown = isOpen ? null : name;
        renderFilterBar();
      });

      pill.appendChild(labelBtn);
      pill.appendChild(chevBtn);
      wrap.appendChild(pill);

      // dropdown
      if (isOpen) {
        const dd = document.createElement('div');
        dd.style.cssText = `position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 6px);left:0;background:var(--background,#fff);border:1.5px solid ${g.color}40;border-radius:10px;padding:0.35rem 0.3rem;z-index:200;min-width:170px;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.13);display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.1rem;`;
        [...g.tags].filter(t => usedTags.has(t)).sort().forEach(tag => {
          const on = activeFilters.has(tag);
          const tb = document.createElement('button');
          tb.textContent = tag;
          tb.style.cssText = `background:${on ? `color-mix(in srgb,${g.color} 14%,transparent)` : 'transparent'};color:${g.color};border:none;text-align:left;padding:0.22rem 0.65rem;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.76rem;font-weight:${on ? 600 : 400};font-family:inherit;transition:background 0.1s;`;
          tb.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => { if (!on) tb.style.background = `color-mix(in srgb,${g.color} 7%,transparent)`; });
          tb.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { if (!on) tb.style.background = 'transparent'; });
          tb.addEventListener('click', e => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            activeFilters.delete(name);
            if (activeFilters.has(tag)) activeFilters.delete(tag); else activeFilters.add(tag);
            renderFilterBar(); renderList();
          });
          dd.appendChild(tb);
        });
        wrap.appendChild(dd);
      }

      filterBar.appendChild(wrap);
    });
  }

  document.addEventListener('click', () => {
    if (openDropdown) { openDropdown = null; renderFilterBar(); }
  });

  function getBookSvg() {
    const c = (window.CCM_COLORS && window.CCM_COLORS.accent) || '#c05a4a';
    return `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="1.75" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M2 3h6a4 4 0 0 1 4 4v14a3 3 0 0 0-3-3H2z"/><path d="M22 3h-6a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v14a3 3 0 0 1 3-3h7z"/></svg>`;
  }

  function tagPill(tag) {
    const c = tagColor(tag);
    return `<span style="display:inline-block;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;color:${c};background:color-mix(in srgb,${c} 12%,transparent);border-radius:999px;padding:0.1rem 0.55rem;margin-right:0.3rem;margin-top:0.35rem;">${tag}</span>`;
  }

  function renderCard(entry) {
    const { doi, title, authors, year, journal, note, abstract, tags = [] } = entry;
    const url          = `https://doi.org/${doi}`;
    const displayTitle = title || doi;
    const byline       = [authors, year, journal].filter(Boolean).join(' · ');
    const tagHtml      = tags.map(tagPill).join('');
    const noteHtml     = note
      ? `<div style="font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:0.4rem;line-height:1.6;">${note}${abstract ? ` <span title="${abstract.replace(/"/g,'&quot;')}" style="cursor:help;opacity:0.45;font-size:0.8rem;"> ···</span>` : ''}</div>`
      : '';
    return `<div class="pub-entry-block"><div class="pub-favicon-fallback">${getBookSvg()}</div><div class="pub-entry-text"><a href="${url}" target="_blank" class="pub-title-link">${displayTitle}</a>${byline?`<div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:0.2rem;font-style:italic;">${byline}</div>`:''} ${tagHtml?`<div style="margin-top:0.1rem;">${tagHtml}</div>`:''} ${noteHtml}</div></div>`;
  }

  function renderList() {
    const filtered = entries.filter(entryMatches);
    if (!filtered.length) { container.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;">No entries for this filter.</p>'; return; }
    container.innerHTML = filtered.map(renderCard).join('');
  }

  renderFilterBar();
  renderList();
})();
</script>
```
